question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only introduces the problem statement and the relevance of the topic without outlining the specific structure (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Results, Conclusion).

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of each section. It provides a general overview of the comparison between Laravel and Analog.js but fails to detail what specific content will be covered in the various parts of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be easily understood from this text. While the topic is clear, the absence of a chapter outline or a roadmap of the research makes it impossible to deduce how the thesis is organized.
